TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Gustavo Ay√≥n kakilimaan u miunduay a tademaw, mimali i Amilika NBA. nilacul u tatama, lumeniay a banges. nalecuhan ciniza i 4 a bulad 1 a demiad 1985 a mihcaan, Gustavo Ay√≥n, miunduay. mapataytu i 2007 a mihcaan. u lumeniay ku banges ciniza. talakaway a tademaw, sisa, mimali tu kanas-mali. singisngis ciniza i bihid. pahezek tabakiay a cacudadan: Pepperdine (1971 a mihcaan katukuh 1973 a mihcaan) mapili'ay a mihcaan/silsil: 1973 a mihcaan/saka walu ku uwac/silsil lima a bataan izaw ku lima mapili'ay a mali-putiput: Portland Trail Blazers
S.PHON: gusta*o aj*n kakir~…ĺimaan u miunduaj a tad…ômaw, mimar~…ĺi i amir~…ĺika nba. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u tatama, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a baŇč…ôs. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad **** a mińß ¶aan, gusta*o aj*n, miunduaj. mapatajtu i **** a mińß ¶aan. u r~…ĺum…ôniaj ku baŇč…ôs ¶iniza. tar~…ĺakawaj a tad…ômaw, sisa, mimar~…ĺi tu kanas-mar~…ĺi. siŇčisŇčis ¶iniza i bińßid. pańß…ôz…ôk tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan: p…ôpp…ôrdin…ô (**** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan) mapir~…ĺi Ē~ °aj a mińß ¶aan/sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ: **** a mińß ¶aan/saka war~…ĺu ku uwa ¶/sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ r~…ĺima a bataan izaw ku r~…ĺima mapir~…ĺi Ē~ °aj a mar~…ĺi-putiput: portr~…ĺand trair~…ĺ br~…ĺaz…ôrs
S.FORM: Gustavo Ay√≥n kakilimaan u miunduay a tademaw, mimali i Amilika NBA. nilacul u tatama, lumeniay a banges. nalecuhan ciniza i 4 a bulad 1 a demiad 1985 a mihcaan, Gustavo Ay√≥n, miunduay. mapataytu i 2007 a mihcaan. u lumeniay ku banges ciniza. talakaway a tademaw, sisa, mimali tu kanas-mali. singisngis ciniza i bihid. pahezek tabakiay a cacudadan: Pepperdine (1971 a mihcaan katukuh 1973 a mihcaan) mapili'ay a mihcaan/silsil: 1973 a mihcaan/saka walu ku uwac/silsil lima a bataan izaw ku lima mapili'ay a mali-putiput: Portland Trail Blazers
